---
title: "Tjernobyl mentions per year"
author: "Mikkel Vayland Hansen & Andrea Kesmodel"
date: "2026-05-21"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```



```{r}

# load packages
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)

# read data
data <- read_csv("data/mentions per year.csv")

# rename columns
colnames(data) <- c("Year", "Mentions")

# make graph
ggplot(data, aes(x = Year, y = Mentions)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue") +
  geom_point(color = "darkred") +
  labs(
    title = "Mentions of Tjernobyl per Year in Danish Media",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of Articles"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
